# Hookraft

Hookraft is a collection of composable React hooks for async flows, queues, authentication, and undo/redo state management.

## Hooks
- useQueue: process tasks in sequence with concurrency control
- useAuth: JWT authentication with brute force protection
- useHistory: undo/redo for any React state
- useDoorway: component lifecycle and async state management

## Links
- Site: https://hookraft.site
- Docs: https://hookraft.site/docs/introduction
- GitHub: https://github.com/purposewalks9/Hookraft
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@hookraft/usequeue
